zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Giles Astley於1279年出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，他的父親Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley27歲，母親Mrs. Sybil Astley29歲。他於1304年與Alice de Wolvey在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾維結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1338年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Giles Astley于1279年出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，他的父亲Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley27岁，母亲Mrs. Sybil Astley29岁。他于1304年与Alice de Wolvey在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾維结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1338年在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Giles Astley was born in 1279, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Sybil Astley, was 29. He married Alice de Wolvey in 1304, in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1338, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Giles Astley est né en 1279, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Sybil Astley, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Wolvey en 1304, à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1338, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Giles Astley 1279 in Astley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Sybil Astley 29. Er hat 1304 in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England Alice de Wolvey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1338 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Astley, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles Astley è nato il nel 1279 nel Astley, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Sybil Astley, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Wolvey nel 1304, nel Wolvey, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1338, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Astley, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Astleyが1279年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astleyは27歳，母Mrs. Sybil Astleyは29歳であった。1304年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーでAlice de Wolveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1338年に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Astley(이)가 1279년 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Sybil Astley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1304년 영국 워윅실르 울비에서 Alice de Wolvey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles Astley nasceu em 1279, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Sybil Astley, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Wolvey em 1304, em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1338, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Giles Astley родился в 1279 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Sybil Astley, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Wolvey в 1304 г. в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1338 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Giles Astley nació en 1279, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Sybil Astley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice de Wolvey en 1304, en Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1338, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
